Haiku, and fallback traffic to different providers.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNative Claude Code \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e picker support through the proxy's optimizations.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOptional Discord or Telegram bot wrapper for remote coding sessions.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOptional voice-note transcription through local Whisper Picker-safe IDs are routed back to the real provider/model automatically, so no \u003ccode\u003e.env\u003c/code\u003e edit or separate launcher script is needed after startup.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eEach provider model also has a \u003ccode\u003e(no thinking)\u003c/code\u003e picker variant. Use it when a model does not support Claude Code thinking or fails with adaptive-thinking requests. |\n        | Anthropic Messages API\n        v\nFree Claude Code proxy (:8082)\n        |\n        | provider-specific request/stream adapter\n        v\nNIM / OpenRouter / DeepSeek / LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama\n\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eImportant pieces:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFastAPI exposes Anthropic-compatible routes such as \u003ccode\u003e/v1/messages\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/v1/messages/count_tokens\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003e/v1/models\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eModel routing resolves the Claude model name to \u003ccode\u003eMODEL_OPUS\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eMODEL_SONNET\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eMODEL_HAIKU\u003c/code\u003e, or \u003ccode\u003eMODEL\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNIM uses OpenAI chat streaming translated into Anthropic SSE.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and Ollama use Anthropic Messages style transports.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThe proxy normalizes thinking blocks, tool calls, token usage metadata, and provider errors into the shape Claude Code expects.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRequest optimizations answer trivial Claude Code probes locally to save latency and quota.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" class="react-directory-row-commit-cell"><div><div class="react-directory-commit-message"><a data-pjax="true" title="Bump astral-sh/setup-uv from 7.3.0 to 8.1.0 (#172)

Bumps [astral-sh/setup-uv](https://github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv) from
7.3.0 to 8.1.0.
<details>
<summary>Release notes</summary>
<p><em>Sourced from <a
href="https://github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/releases">astral-sh/setup-uv's
releases</a>.</em></p>
<blockquote>
<h2>v8.1.0 🌈 New input <code>no-project</code></h2>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<p>This add the a new boolean input <code>no-project</code>.
It only makes sense to use in combination with
<code>activate-environment: true</code> and will append <code>--no
project</code> to the <code>uv venv</code> call. This is for example
useful <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/854">if you
have a pyproject.toml file with parts unparseable by uv</a></p>
<h2>🚀 Enhancements</h2>
<ul>
<li>Add input no-project in combination with activate-environment <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/856">#856</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>🧰 Maintenance</h2>
<ul>
<li>fix: grant contents:write to validate-release job <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/860">#860</a>)</li>
<li>Add a release-gate step to the release workflow <a
href="https://github.com/zanieb"><code>@​zanieb</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/859">#859</a>)</li>
<li>Draft commitish releases <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/858">#858</a>)</li>
<li>Add action-types.yml to instructions <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/857">#857</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.7 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/853">#853</a>)</li>
<li>Refactor version resolving <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/852">#852</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.6 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/850">#850</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.5 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/845">#845</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.4 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/843">#843</a>)</li>
<li>Add a release workflow <a
href="https://github.com/zanieb"><code>@​zanieb</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/839">#839</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.3 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/836">#836</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>📚 Documentation</h2>
<ul>
<li>Update ignore-nothing-to-cache documentation <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/833">#833</a>)</li>
<li>Pin setup-uv docs to v8 <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/829">#829</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>⬆️ Dependency updates</h2>
<ul>
<li>chore(deps): bump release-drafter/release-drafter from 7.1.1 to
7.2.0 @<a href="https://github.com/apps/dependabot">dependabot[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/855">#855</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>v8.0.0 🌈 Immutable releases and secure tags</h2>
<h1>This is the first immutable release of <code>setup-uv</code> 🥳</h1>
<p>All future releases are also immutable, if you want to know more
about what this means checkout <a
href="https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/concepts/supply-chain-security/immutable-releases">the
docs</a>.</p>
<p>This release also has two breaking changes</p>
<h2>New format for <code>manifest-file</code></h2>
<p>The previously deprecated way of defining a custom version manifest
to control which <code>uv</code> versions are available and where to
download them from got removed. The functionality is still there but you
have to use the <a
href="https://github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/blob/main/docs/customization.md#format">new
format</a>.</p>
<h2>No more major and minor tags</h2>
<p>To increase <strong>security</strong> even more we will <strong>stop
publishing minor tags</strong>. You won't be able to use
<code>@v8</code> or <code>@v8.0</code> any longer. We do this because
pinning to major releases opens up users to supply chain attacks like
what happened to <a
href="https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/github-actions-supply-chain-attack/">tj-actions</a>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>[!TIP]
Use the immutable tag as a version
<code>astral-sh/setup-uv@v8.0.0</code>
Or even better the githash
<code>astral-sh/setup-uv@cec208311dfd045dd5311c1add060b2062131d57</code></p>
</blockquote>

<details>

<blockquote>
<h2>v8.1.0 🌈 New input <code>no-project</code></h2>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<p>This add the a new boolean input <code>no-project</code>.
It only makes sense to use in combination with
<code>activate-environment: true</code> and will append <code>--no
project</code> to the <code>uv venv</code> call. This is for example
useful <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/854">if you
have a pyproject.toml file with parts unparseable by uv</a></p>
<h2>🚀 Enhancements</h2>
<ul>
<li>Add input no-project in combination with activate-environment <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/856">#856</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>🧰 Maintenance</h2>
<ul>
<li>fix: grant contents:write to validate-release job <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/860">#860</a>)</li>
<li>Add a release-gate step to the release workflow <a
href="https://github.com/zanieb"><code>@​zanieb</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/859">#859</a>)</li>
<li>Draft commitish releases <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/858">#858</a>)</li>
<li>Add action-types.yml to instructions <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/857">#857</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.7 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/853">#853</a>)</li>
<li>Refactor version resolving <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/852">#852</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.6 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/850">#850</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.5 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/845">#845</a>)</li>
<li>chore: update known checksums for 0.11.4 @<a
href="https://github.com/apps/github-actions">github-actions[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/843">#843</a>)</li>
<li>Add a release workflow <a

(<a

</ul>
<h2>📚 Documentation</h2>
<ul>
<li>Update ignore-nothing-to-cache documentation <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/833">#833</a>)</li>
<li>Pin setup-uv docs to v8 <a
href="https://github.com/eifinger"><code>@​eifinger</code></a> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/829">#829</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>⬆️ Dependency updates</h2>
<ul>
<li>chore(deps): bump release-drafter/release-drafter from 7.1.1 to
7.2.0 @<a href="https://github.com/apps/dependabot">dependabot[bot]</a>
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/issues/855">#855</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>v8.0.0 🌈 Immutable releases and secure tags</h2>
<h1>This is the first immutable release of <code>setup-uv</code> 🥳</h1>
<p>All future releases are also immutable, if you want to know more
about what this means checkout <a
href="https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/concepts/supply-chain-security/immutable-releases">the
docs</a>.</p>
<p>This release also has two breaking changes</p>
<h2>New format for <code>manifest-file</code></h2>
<p>The previously deprecated way of defining a custom version manifest
to control which <code>uv</code> versions are available and where to
download them from got removed. The functionality is still there but you
have to use the <a
href="https://github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/blob/main/docs/customization.md#format">new
format</a>.</p>
<h2>No more major and minor tags</h2>
<p>To increase <strong>security</strong> even more we will <strong>stop
publishing minor tags</strong>. You won't be able to use
<code>@v8</code> or <code>@v8.0</code> any longer. We do this because
pinning to major releases opens up users to supply chain attacks like
what happened to <a
href="https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/github-actions-supply-chain-attack/">tj-actions</a>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>[!TIP]
Use the immutable tag as a version
<code>astral-sh/setup-uv@v8.0.0</code>
Or even better the githash
<code>astral-sh/setup-uv@cec208311dfd045dd5311c1add060b2062131d57</code></p>
</blockquote>

<h2>Version 0.46.0</h2>
<h2>What's Changed</h2>
<ul>
<li>Support <code>ws_max_size</code> in <code>wsproto</code>
implementation by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2915">Kludex/uvicorn#2915</a></li>
<li>Support <code>ws_ping_interval</code> and
<code>ws_ping_timeout</code> in <code>wsproto</code> implementation by
<a href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2916">Kludex/uvicorn#2916</a></li>
<li>Use <code>bytearray</code> for incoming WebSocket message buffer in
websockets-sansio by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2917">Kludex/uvicorn#2917</a></li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/compare/0.45.0...0.46.0">https://github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/compare/0.45.0...0.46.0</a></p>
<h2>Version 0.45.0</h2>
<h2>What's Changed</h2>
<ul>
<li>Preserve forwarded client ports in proxy headers middleware by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2903">Kludex/uvicorn#2903</a></li>
<li>Accept <code>os.PathLike</code> for <code>log_config</code> by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2905">Kludex/uvicorn#2905</a></li>
<li>Accept <code>log_level</code> strings case-insensitively by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2907">Kludex/uvicorn#2907</a></li>
<li>Raise helpful <code>ImportError</code> when PyYAML is missing for
YAML log config by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2906">Kludex/uvicorn#2906</a></li>
<li>Revert empty context for ASGI runs by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2911">Kludex/uvicorn#2911</a></li>
<li>Add <code>--reset-contextvars</code> flag to isolate ASGI request
context by <a href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a>
in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2912">Kludex/uvicorn#2912</a></li>
<li>Revert &quot;Emit <code>http.disconnect</code> on server shutdown
for streaming responses&quot; (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2829">#2829</a>)
by <a href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2913">Kludex/uvicorn#2913</a></li>
</ul>
<h2>New Contributors</h2>
<ul>

href="https://github.com/Krishnachaitanyakc"><code>@​Krishnachaitanyakc</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a

</ul>

<h2>What's Changed</h2>
<ul>
<li>Implement websocket keepalive pings for websockets-sansio by <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/pull/2888">Kludex/uvicorn#2888</a></li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a
href="https://github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/compare/0.43.0...0.44.0">https://github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/compare/0.43.0...0.44.0</a></p>
<h2>Version 0.43.0</h2>
<h2>Changed</h2>
<ul>
<li>Emit <code>http.disconnect</code> ASGI <code>receive()</code> event
on server shutting down for streaming responses (<a

href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2859">#2859</a>)</li>
<li>Drop cast in ASGI types (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2875">#2875</a>)</li>
</ul>
<hr />
<p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a

href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2845">#2845</a>)</li>
</ul>

<blockquote>
<h2>0.46.0 (April 23, 2026)</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Support <code>ws_max_size</code> in <code>wsproto</code>
implementation (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2915">#2915</a>)</li>
<li>Support <code>ws_ping_interval</code> and

href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2916">#2916</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>
<li>Use <code>bytearray</code> for incoming WebSocket message buffer in
<code>websockets-sansio</code> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2917">#2917</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>0.45.0 (April 21, 2026)</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Add <code>--reset-contextvars</code> flag to isolate ASGI request
context (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2912">#2912</a>)</li>
<li>Accept <code>os.PathLike</code> for <code>log_config</code> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2905">#2905</a>)</li>
<li>Accept <code>log_level</code> strings case-insensitively (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2907">#2907</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>
<li>Revert &quot;Emit <code>http.disconnect</code> on server shutdown
for streaming responses&quot; (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2913">#2913</a>)</li>
<li>Revert &quot;Explicitly start ASGI run with empty context&quot; (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2911">#2911</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Fixed</h3>
<ul>
<li>Preserve forwarded client ports in proxy headers middleware (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2903">#2903</a>)</li>
<li>Raise helpful <code>ImportError</code> when PyYAML is missing for

href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2906">#2906</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>0.44.0 (April 6, 2026)</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Implement websocket keepalive pings for websockets-sansio (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2888">#2888</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>0.43.0 (April 3, 2026)</h2>
<p>You can quit Uvicorn now. We heard you, <a

Updates `python-dotenv` from 1.2.1 to 1.2.2
<details>
<summary>Release notes</summary>
<p><em>Sourced from <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/releases">python-dotenv's
releases</a>.</em></p>
<blockquote>
<h2>v1.2.2</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Support for Python 3.14, including the free-threaded (3.14t) build.
(#)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>
<li>The <code>dotenv run</code> command now forwards flags directly to
the specified command by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/607">theskumar/python-dotenv#607</a></li>
<li>Improved documentation clarity regarding override behavior and the
reference page.</li>
<li>Updated PyPy support to version 3.11.</li>
<li>Documentation for FIFO file support.</li>
<li>Support for Python 3.9.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Fixed</h3>
<ul>
<li>Improved <code>set_key</code> and <code>unset_key</code> behavior
when interacting with symlinks by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/commit/790c5c02991100aa1bf41ee5330aca75edc51311">#790c5</a></li>
<li>Corrected the license specifier and added missing Python 3.14
classifiers in package metadata by <a
href="https://github.com/JYOuyang"><code>@​JYOuyang</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/590">theskumar/python-dotenv#590</a></li>
</ul>
<h3>Breaking Changes</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p><code>dotenv.set_key</code> and <code>dotenv.unset_key</code> used to
follow symlinks in some
situations. This is no longer the case. For that behavior to be restored
in
all cases, <code>follow_symlinks=True</code> should be used.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>In the CLI, <code>set</code> and <code>unset</code> used to follow
symlinks in some situations. This
is no longer the case.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>dotenv.set_key</code>, <code>dotenv.unset_key</code> and the
CLI commands <code>set</code> and <code>unset</code>
used to reset the file mode of the modified .env file to
<code>0o600</code> in some
situations. This is no longer the case: The original mode of the file is
now
preserved. Is the file needed to be created or wasn't a regular file,
mode
<code>0o600</code> is used.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3>Misc</h3>
<ul>
<li>skip 000 permission tests for root user by <a
href="https://github.com/burnout-projects"><code>@​burnout-projects</code></a>
in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/561">theskumar/python-dotenv#561</a></li>
<li>Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group by <a
href="https://github.com/dependabot"><code>@​dependabot</code></a>[bot]
in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/593">theskumar/python-dotenv#593</a></li>
<li>Add Windows testing to CI by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/604">theskumar/python-dotenv#604</a></li>
<li>Improve workflow efficiency with best practices by <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar"><code>@​theskumar</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/609">theskumar/python-dotenv#609</a></li>
<li>Remove the use of <code>sh</code> in tests by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/612">theskumar/python-dotenv#612</a></li>
</ul>
<h2>New Contributors</h2>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://github.com/JYOuyang"><code>@​JYOuyang</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/590">theskumar/python-dotenv#590</a></li>
<li><a
href="https://github.com/burnout-projects"><code>@​burnout-projects</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/561">theskumar/python-dotenv#561</a></li>
<li><a
href="https://github.com/cpackham-atlnz"><code>@​cpackham-atlnz</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/597">theskumar/python-dotenv#597</a></li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2">https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2</a></p>
</blockquote>
</details>

Updates `grpcio` from 1.78.0 to 1.80.0
<details>
<summary>Release notes</summary>
<p><em>Sourced from <a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases">grpcio's
releases</a>.</em></p>
<blockquote>
<h2>Release v1.80.0</h2>
<p>This is release 1.80.0 (<a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/g_stands_for.md">glimmering</a>)
of gRPC Core.</p>
<p>For gRPC documentation, see <a href="https://grpc.io/">grpc.io</a>.
For previous releases, see <a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases">Releases</a>.</p>
<p>This release contains refinements, improvements, and bug fixes, with
highlights listed below.</p>
<h2>Core</h2>
<ul>
<li>[ssl] Implement TLS private key signer in Python. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41701">#41701</a>)</li>
<li>[TLS Credentials]: Private Key Offload Implementation. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41606">#41606</a>)</li>
<li>Fix max sockaddr struct size on OpenBSD. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40454">#40454</a>)</li>
<li>[core] Enable EventEngine for Python by default, and EventEngine
fork support in Python and Ruby. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41432">#41432</a>)</li>
<li>[TLS Credentials]: Create InMemoryCertificateProvider to update
certificates independently. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41484">#41484</a>)</li>
<li>[Ruby] Build/test ruby 4.0 and build native gems with Ruby 4.0
support. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41324">#41324</a>)</li>
<li>[EventEngine] Remove an incorrect std::move in DNSServiceResolver
constructor. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41502">#41502</a>)</li>
<li>[RR and WRR] enable change to connect from a random index. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41472">#41472</a>)</li>
<li>[xds] Implement gRFC A101. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41051">#41051</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>C++</h2>
<ul>
<li>[C++] Add SNI override option to C++ channel credentials options
API. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41460">#41460</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>C#</h2>
<ul>
<li>[C# tools] Option to append Async to server side method names <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/39010">#39010</a>.
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/39797">#39797</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>Objective-C</h2>
<ul>
<li>[Fix][Compiler] Plugins fall back to the edition 2023 for older
protobuf. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41357">#41357</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>PHP</h2>
<ul>
<li>[PHP] Disable php infinite recursion check for callback from Core to
PHP. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41835">#41835</a>)</li>
<li>[PHP] Fix runtime error with PHp8.5 alpha because
zend_exception_get_defaul…. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40337">#40337</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>Python</h2>
<ul>
<li>[Python] Fix <code>GRPC_TRACE</code> not working when absl log
initialized in cython. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41814">#41814</a>)</li>
<li>Revert &quot;[Python] Align GRPC_ENABLE_FORK_SUPPORT env defaults in
core and python (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/41455">#41455</a>)&quot;.
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41769">#41769</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] Fix AsyncIO Server maximum_concurrent_rpcs enforcement
preventing negative active_rpcs count. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41532">#41532</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] Docs: correct <code>grpc.Compression</code> references. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41705">#41705</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] [Typeguard] Part 4 - Add Typeguard to AIO stack in tests .
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40226">#40226</a>)</li>
</ul>
<!-- raw HTML omitted -->
</blockquote>

by <a href="https://github.com/Kludex"><code>@​Kludex</code></a> in <a

</ul>

<ul>

<code>websockets-sansio</code> (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2917">#2917</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>0.45.0 (April 21, 2026)</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Add <code>--reset-contextvars</code> flag to isolate ASGI request
context (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2912">#2912</a>)</li>

href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2905">#2905</a>)</li>
<li>Accept <code>log_level</code> strings case-insensitively (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2907">#2907</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>

for streaming responses&quot; (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn/issues/2913">#2913</a>)</li>

Updates `python-dotenv` from 1.2.1 to 1.2.2
<details>
<summary>Release notes</summary>
<p><em>Sourced from <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/releases">python-dotenv's
releases</a>.</em></p>
<blockquote>
<h2>v1.2.2</h2>
<h3>Added</h3>
<ul>
<li>Support for Python 3.14, including the free-threaded (3.14t) build.
(#)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Changed</h3>
<ul>
<li>The <code>dotenv run</code> command now forwards flags directly to
the specified command by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/607">theskumar/python-dotenv#607</a></li>
<li>Improved documentation clarity regarding override behavior and the
reference page.</li>
<li>Updated PyPy support to version 3.11.</li>
<li>Documentation for FIFO file support.</li>
<li>Support for Python 3.9.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Fixed</h3>
<ul>
<li>Improved <code>set_key</code> and <code>unset_key</code> behavior
when interacting with symlinks by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/commit/790c5c02991100aa1bf41ee5330aca75edc51311">#790c5</a></li>
<li>Corrected the license specifier and added missing Python 3.14
classifiers in package metadata by <a
href="https://github.com/JYOuyang"><code>@​JYOuyang</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/590">theskumar/python-dotenv#590</a></li>
</ul>
<h3>Breaking Changes</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p><code>dotenv.set_key</code> and <code>dotenv.unset_key</code> used to
follow symlinks in some
situations. This is no longer the case. For that behavior to be restored
in
all cases, <code>follow_symlinks=True</code> should be used.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>In the CLI, <code>set</code> and <code>unset</code> used to follow
symlinks in some situations. This
is no longer the case.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>dotenv.set_key</code>, <code>dotenv.unset_key</code> and the
CLI commands <code>set</code> and <code>unset</code>
used to reset the file mode of the modified .env file to
<code>0o600</code> in some
situations. This is no longer the case: The original mode of the file is
now
preserved. Is the file needed to be created or wasn't a regular file,
mode
<code>0o600</code> is used.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3>Misc</h3>
<ul>
<li>skip 000 permission tests for root user by <a
href="https://github.com/burnout-projects"><code>@​burnout-projects</code></a>
in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/561">theskumar/python-dotenv#561</a></li>
<li>Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group by <a
href="https://github.com/dependabot"><code>@​dependabot</code></a>[bot]
in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/593">theskumar/python-dotenv#593</a></li>
<li>Add Windows testing to CI by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/604">theskumar/python-dotenv#604</a></li>
<li>Improve workflow efficiency with best practices by <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar"><code>@​theskumar</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/609">theskumar/python-dotenv#609</a></li>
<li>Remove the use of <code>sh</code> in tests by <a
href="https://github.com/bbc2"><code>@​bbc2</code></a> in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/612">theskumar/python-dotenv#612</a></li>
</ul>
<h2>New Contributors</h2>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://github.com/JYOuyang"><code>@​JYOuyang</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/590">theskumar/python-dotenv#590</a></li>
<li><a
href="https://github.com/burnout-projects"><code>@​burnout-projects</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/561">theskumar/python-dotenv#561</a></li>
<li><a
href="https://github.com/cpackham-atlnz"><code>@​cpackham-atlnz</code></a>
made their first contribution in <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/pull/597">theskumar/python-dotenv#597</a></li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a
href="https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2">https://github.com/theskumar/python-dotenv/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2</a></p>
</blockquote>
</details>

<details>

<p>Full Changelog: <a

<h3>Features</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>api:</strong> Add detail to InputFileContent (<a
href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/60de21d1fcfbcadea0d9b8d884c73c9dc49d14ff">60de21d</a>)</li>
<li><strong>api:</strong> add OAuthErrorCode type (<a

<li><strong>client:</strong> add event handler implementation for
websockets (<a
href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/0280d0568f706684ecbf0aabf3575cdcb7fd22d5">0280d05</a>)</li>
<li><strong>client:</strong> allow enqueuing to websockets even when not
connected (<a
href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/67aa20e69bc0e4a3b7694327c808606bfa24a966">67aa20e</a>)</li>
<li><strong>client:</strong> support reconnection in websockets (<a
href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/eb72a953ea9dc5beec3eef537be6eb32292c3f65">eb72a95</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Bug Fixes</h3>
<ul>

href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/c0c2ecd0f6b64fa5fafda6134bb06995b143a2cf">c0c2ecd</a>)</li>
</ul>

href="https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/84712fa0f094b53151a0fe6ac85aa98018b2a7e2">84712fa</a>)</li>

Updates `grpcio` from 1.78.0 to 1.80.0
<details>
<summary>Release notes</summary>
<p><em>Sourced from <a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases">grpcio's
releases</a>.</em></p>
<blockquote>
<h2>Release v1.80.0</h2>
<p>This is release 1.80.0 (<a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/g_stands_for.md">glimmering</a>)
of gRPC Core.</p>
<p>For gRPC documentation, see <a href="https://grpc.io/">grpc.io</a>.
For previous releases, see <a
href="https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases">Releases</a>.</p>
<p>This release contains refinements, improvements, and bug fixes, with
highlights listed below.</p>
<h2>Core</h2>
<ul>
<li>[ssl] Implement TLS private key signer in Python. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41701">#41701</a>)</li>
<li>[TLS Credentials]: Private Key Offload Implementation. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41606">#41606</a>)</li>
<li>Fix max sockaddr struct size on OpenBSD. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40454">#40454</a>)</li>
<li>[core] Enable EventEngine for Python by default, and EventEngine
fork support in Python and Ruby. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41432">#41432</a>)</li>
<li>[TLS Credentials]: Create InMemoryCertificateProvider to update
certificates independently. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41484">#41484</a>)</li>
<li>[Ruby] Build/test ruby 4.0 and build native gems with Ruby 4.0
support. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41324">#41324</a>)</li>
<li>[EventEngine] Remove an incorrect std::move in DNSServiceResolver
constructor. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41502">#41502</a>)</li>
<li>[RR and WRR] enable change to connect from a random index. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41472">#41472</a>)</li>
<li>[xds] Implement gRFC A101. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41051">#41051</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>C++</h2>
<ul>
<li>[C++] Add SNI override option to C++ channel credentials options
API. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41460">#41460</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>C#</h2>
<ul>
<li>[C# tools] Option to append Async to server side method names <a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/39010">#39010</a>.
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/39797">#39797</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>Objective-C</h2>
<ul>
<li>[Fix][Compiler] Plugins fall back to the edition 2023 for older
protobuf. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41357">#41357</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>PHP</h2>
<ul>
<li>[PHP] Disable php infinite recursion check for callback from Core to
PHP. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41835">#41835</a>)</li>
<li>[PHP] Fix runtime error with PHp8.5 alpha because
zend_exception_get_defaul…. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40337">#40337</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>Python</h2>
<ul>
<li>[Python] Fix <code>GRPC_TRACE</code> not working when absl log
initialized in cython. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41814">#41814</a>)</li>
<li>Revert &quot;[Python] Align GRPC_ENABLE_FORK_SUPPORT env defaults in
core and python (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/41455">#41455</a>)&quot;.
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41769">#41769</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] Fix AsyncIO Server maximum_concurrent_rpcs enforcement
preventing negative active_rpcs count. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41532">#41532</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] Docs: correct <code>grpc.Compression</code> references. (<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/41705">#41705</a>)</li>
<li>[Python] [Typeguard] Part 4 - Add Typeguard to AIO stack in tests .
(<a
href="https://redirect.github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/40226">#40226</a>)</li>
</ul>
<!-- raw HTML omitted -->
</blockquote>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤖 Free Claude Code</h1><a id="user-content--free-claude-code" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤖 Free Claude Code" href="#-free-claude-code"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Use Claude Code CLI, VS Code, JetBrains ACP, or chat bots through your own Anthropic-compatible proxy.</p>

<p dir="auto">Free Claude Code routes Anthropic Messages API traffic from Claude Code to NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llama.cpp, or Ollama. It keeps Claude Code's client-side protocol stable while letting you choose free, paid, or local models.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">What You Get</h2><a id="user-content-what-you-get" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: What You Get" href="#what-you-get"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Drop-in proxy for Claude Code's Anthropic API calls.</li>
<li>Six provider backends: NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and Ollama.</li>
<li>Per-model routing: send Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, and fallback traffic to different providers.</li>
<li>Native Claude Code <code>/model</code> picker support through the proxy's <code>/v1/models</code> endpoint.</li>
<li>Streaming, tool use, reasoning/thinking block handling, and local request optimizations.</li>
<li>Optional Discord or Telegram bot wrapper for remote coding sessions.</li>
<li>Optional voice-note transcription through local Whisper or NVIDIA NIM.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Quick Start</h2><a id="user-content-quick-start" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Quick Start" href="#quick-start"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Edit <code>.env</code> and choose one provider. For the default NVIDIA NIM path:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-v">NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nvapi-your-key<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">MODEL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>nvidia_nim/z-ai/glm4.7<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>freecc<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY="nvapi-your-key"

ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="freecc"" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Use any local secret for <code>ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN</code>; Claude Code will send the same value back to this proxy. Leave it empty only for local/private testing.</p>

<p dir="auto">Package install alternative:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>uv tool install git+https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code.git

<p dir="auto"><code>fcc-init</code> creates <code>~/.config/free-claude-code/.env</code> from the bundled template.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Run Claude Code</h3><a id="user-content-4-run-claude-code" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Run Claude Code" href="#4-run-claude-code"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Point <code>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</code> at the proxy root. Do not append <code>/v1</code>.</p>
<p dir="auto">PowerShell:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-powershell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-smi">$<span class="pl-c1">env:</span>ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>freecc<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>; <span class="pl-smi">$<span class="pl-c1">env:</span>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8082<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>; claude</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto"><code>MODEL</code> is the fallback. <code>MODEL_OPUS</code>, <code>MODEL_SONNET</code>, and <code>MODEL_HAIKU</code> override routing for requests that Claude Code sends for those tiers.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Connect Claude Code</h2><a id="user-content-connect-claude-code" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Connect Claude Code" href="#connect-claude-code"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Claude Code CLI</h3><a id="user-content-claude-code-cli" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Claude Code CLI" href="#claude-code-cli"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>freecc<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8082<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> claude</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">VS Code Extension</h3><a id="user-content-vs-code-extension" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: VS Code Extension" href="#vs-code-extension"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Open Settings, search for <code>claude-code.environmentVariables</code>, choose <strong>Edit in settings.json</strong>, and add:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">"claudeCode.environmentVariables"</span>: [
  { <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"value"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8082<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> },
  { <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"value"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>freecc<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> }
]</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value=""claudeCode.environmentVariables": [
  { "name": "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", "value": "http://localhost:8082" },
  { "name": "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN", "value": "freecc" }
]" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Reload the extension. If the extension shows a login screen, choose the Anthropic Console path once; the local proxy still handles model traffic after the environment variables are active.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">JetBrains ACP</h3><a id="user-content-jetbrains-acp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: JetBrains ACP" href="#jetbrains-acp"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Edit the installed Claude ACP config:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Windows: <code>C:\Users\%USERNAME%\AppData\Roaming\JetBrains\acp-agents\installed.json</code></li>
<li>Linux/macOS: <code>~/.jetbrains/acp.json</code></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Set the environment for <code>acp.registry.claude-acp</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">"env"</span>: {
  <span class="pl-ent">"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8082<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>freecc<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value=""env": {
  "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "http://localhost:8082",
  "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "freecc"
}" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Restart the IDE after changing the file.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Model Picker</h3><a id="user-content-model-picker" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Model Picker" href="#model-picker"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Claude Code 2.1.126 or later reads this proxy's <code>/v1/models</code> endpoint when <code>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</code> points at the proxy. Start Claude Code normally, run <code>/model</code>, and choose any discovered provider model.</p>
<div align="center" dir="auto">
  <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code/blob/main/cc-model-picker.png"><img src="/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code/raw/main/cc-model-picker.png" alt="Claude Code model picker showing gateway models" width="700" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
</div>
<p dir="auto">The proxy lists models for configured provider keys and referenced local providers. Picker-safe IDs are routed back to the real provider/model automatically, so no <code>.env</code> edit or separate launcher script is needed after startup.</p>
<p dir="auto">Each provider model also has a <code>(no thinking)</code> picker variant. Use it when a model does not support Claude Code thinking or fails with adaptive-thinking requests. It routes to the same upstream model while asking Claude Code to send a non-thinking request.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Optional Integrations</h2><a id="user-content-optional-integrations" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Optional Integrations" href="#optional-integrations"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Discord And Telegram Bots</h3><a id="user-content-discord-and-telegram-bots" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Discord And Telegram Bots" href="#discord-and-telegram-bots"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The bot wrapper runs Claude Code sessions remotely, streams progress, supports reply-based conversation branches, and can stop or clear tasks.</p>
<p dir="auto">Discord minimum config:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-v">MESSAGING_PLATFORM</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>discord<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>your-discord-bot-token<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">ALLOWED_DISCORD_CHANNELS</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>123456789<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">CLAUDE_WORKSPACE</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>./agent_workspace<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">ALLOWED_DIR</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>C:/Users/yourname/projects<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="MESSAGING_PLATFORM="discord"
DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN="your-discord-bot-token"
ALLOWED_DISCORD_CHANNELS="123456789"
CLAUDE_WORKSPACE="./agent_workspace"
ALLOWED_DIR="C:/Users/yourname/projects"" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Create the bot in the <a href="https://discord.com/developers/applications" rel="nofollow">Discord Developer Portal</a>, enable Message Content Intent, and invite it with read/send/history permissions.</p>
<p dir="auto">Telegram minimum config:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-v">MESSAGING_PLATFORM</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>telegram<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<p dir="auto">Get a token from <a href="https://t.me/BotFather" rel="nofollow">@BotFather</a> and your user ID from <a href="https://t.me/userinfobot" rel="nofollow">@userinfobot</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto">Useful commands:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>/stop</code> cancels a task; reply to a task message to stop only that branch.</li>
<li><code>/clear</code> resets sessions; reply to clear one branch.</li>
<li><code>/stats</code> shows session state.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Voice Notes</h3><a id="user-content-voice-notes" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Voice Notes" href="#voice-notes"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Use lower limits for free hosted providers; local providers can usually tolerate higher concurrency if the machine can handle it.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Security And Diagnostics</h3><a id="user-content-security-and-diagnostics" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Security And Diagnostics" href="#security-and-diagnostics"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Raw logging flags can expose prompts, tool arguments, paths, and model output. Keep them off unless you are debugging locally.</p>

<p dir="auto">These tools perform outbound HTTP from the proxy. Keep private-network access disabled unless you are in a controlled lab environment.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Troubleshooting</h2><a id="user-content-troubleshooting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Troubleshooting" href="#troubleshooting"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Claude Code says <code>undefined ... input_tokens</code>, <code>$.speed</code>, or malformed response</h3><a id="user-content-claude-code-says-undefined--input_tokens-speed-or-malformed-response" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Claude Code says undefined ... input_tokens, $.speed, or malformed response" href="#claude-code-says-undefined--input_tokens-speed-or-malformed-response"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Update to the latest commit first. Older versions could emit invalid usage metadata in streaming responses. Then check:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</code> is <code>http://localhost:8082</code>, not <code>http://localhost:8082/v1</code>.</li>
<li>The proxy is returning Server-Sent Events for <code>/v1/messages</code>.</li>
<li><code>server.log</code> contains no upstream 400/500 response before the malformed-response error.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">llama.cpp or LM Studio returns HTTP 400</h3><a id="user-content-llamacpp-or-lm-studio-returns-http-400" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: llama.cpp or LM Studio returns HTTP 400" href="#llamacpp-or-lm-studio-returns-http-400"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This usually means the local runtime rejected the Anthropic Messages request before the proxy could stream a model answer.</p>
<p dir="auto">Check:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>The local server supports <code>POST /v1/messages</code>.</li>
<li>The model and runtime support the requested context length and tools.</li>
<li>llama.cpp was started with enough <code>--ctx-size</code> for Claude Code prompts.</li>
<li>The configured base URL includes <code>/v1</code> for LM Studio and llama.cpp.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Provider disconnects during streaming</h3><a id="user-content-provider-disconnects-during-streaming" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Provider disconnects during streaming" href="#provider-disconnects-during-streaming"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Errors like <code>incomplete chunked read</code>, <code>server disconnected</code>, or a peer closing the body usually come from the upstream provider or gateway. Reduce concurrency, raise timeouts, or retry later.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tool calls work on one model but not another</h3><a id="user-content-tool-calls-work-on-one-model-but-not-another" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tool calls work on one model but not another" href="#tool-calls-work-on-one-model-but-not-another"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Tool support is model and provider dependent. Some OpenAI-compatible models emit malformed tool-call deltas, omit tool names, or return tool calls as plain text. Try another model or provider before assuming the proxy is broken.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The VS Code extension still shows a login screen</h3><a id="user-content-the-vs-code-extension-still-shows-a-login-screen" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The VS Code extension still shows a login screen" href="#the-vs-code-extension-still-shows-a-login-screen"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Confirm the extension environment variables are set, then reload the extension or restart VS Code. The browser login flow may still appear once; the local proxy is used when <code>ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL</code> is active in the extension process.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How It Works</h2><a id="user-content-how-it-works" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How It Works" href="#how-it-works"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Important pieces:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>FastAPI exposes Anthropic-compatible routes such as <code>/v1/messages</code>, <code>/v1/messages/count_tokens</code>, and <code>/v1/models</code>.</li>
<li>Model routing resolves the Claude model name to <code>MODEL_OPUS</code>, <code>MODEL_SONNET</code>, <code>MODEL_HAIKU</code>, or <code>MODEL</code>.</li>
<li>NIM uses OpenAI chat streaming translated into Anthropic SSE.</li>
<li>OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and Ollama use Anthropic Messages style transports.</li>
<li>The proxy normalizes thinking blocks, tool calls, token usage metadata, and provider errors into the shape Claude Code expects.</li>
<li>Request optimizations answer trivial Claude Code probes locally to save latency and quota.</li>
</ul>

<p dir="auto"><code>pyproject.toml</code> installs:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>free-claude-code</code>: starts the proxy with configured host and port.</li>
<li><code>fcc-init</code>: creates the user config template at <code>~/.config/free-claude-code/.env</code>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Extending</h3><a id="user-content-extending" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Extending" href="#extending"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Add OpenAI-compatible providers by extending <code>OpenAIChatTransport</code>.</li>
<li>Add Anthropic Messages providers by extending <code>AnthropicMessagesTransport</code>.</li>
<li>Register provider metadata in <code>config.provider_catalog</code> and factory wiring in <code>providers.registry</code>.</li>
<li>Add messaging platforms by implementing the <code>MessagingPlatform</code> interface in <code>messaging/</code>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing" href="#contributing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Report bugs and feature requests in <a href="https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code/issues">Issues</a>.</li>
<li>Keep changes small and covered by focused tests.</li>
<li>Do not open Docker integration PRs.</li>
<li>Do not open README change PRs just open an issue for it.</li>
<li>Run the full check sequence before opening a pull request.</li>
<li>The syntax Except X, Y is brought back in python 3.14 final version (not in 3.14 alpha). Keep in mind before opening PRs.</li>
</ul>
